name: pressroom
description: Turns project artefacts and markdown into publication-grade output. PRESSROOM mines git history, docs, and code for narrative signal and writes articles (origin stories, deep dives, retrospectives, release notes); composes standalone diagrams (Graphviz/Mermaid) that respect A4-portrait legibility rules; and typesets print-quality PDFs with embedded figures. Use it directly on any project, or as the PUBLISHING companion the foundry plugin hands off to when richer-than-markdown output is wanted. Self-improving: every piece of diagram feedback is woven back into the charting matrix so the same composition error never recurs.

metadata.note: skills/ and commands/ are auto-discovered from the plugin root. /publish is the single front door; writer and rich-pdf-with-diagrams reference each other within this plugin via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}.
